name: Webhook Manager
description: Webhook endpoint configuration, event filtering, delivery monitoring, and retry management for platform integrations.

page_briefs.endpoints: Webhook endpoints list in a data table with columns for URL, subscribed events count, status toggle, success rate, and last triggered timestamp. Create-endpoint button in the header. Each row is clickable to navigate to endpoint detail. Bulk actions for enabling, disabling, and deleting endpoints.
page_briefs.endpoint-detail: Endpoint configuration and monitoring page. Top section is a form with URL field, secret display, event type multi-select with category grouping, and active toggle. Below, a live webhook debugger shows a streaming delivery log with expandable rows revealing request headers, payload JSON, response status, and latency. Retry button on failed deliveries.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar navigation with main content area
